service: produced-water / power-fluid injection booster train (LP feeds HP, in series)
train_flow_path: Power Fluid Separator (~217 psig) -> P-1021 LP Booster (~2104 psig) -> P-0901 HP Booster (~3408 psig) -> Power Fluid Wells
specific_gravity_note: Summit selection sheet used SG 1.01; live SCADA dP implies effective SG ~1.04. Tables/CSV use 1.04. Head in feet is SG-independent; only the psi conversion uses SG.

stage.ref_speed_note: coefficient curve normalized to 3500 RPM == 60 Hz; both units are VFD driven, scale with affinity laws

head_per_stage_poly.form: head_ft_per_stage = sum(c[i] * Q**i), Q in BPD, i=0..5, at 60 Hz

bhp_per_stage_poly.form: bhp_per_stage (water, SG 1.0) = sum(c[i] * Q**i), Q in BPD, i=0..5, at 60 Hz

stage.source: Summit selection-tool coefficients, P-0901 HP Booster/Equipment Data/SN35000 Coeff.xlsx

P-0901_HP_Booster.description: single 17-stage SN35000CCW HPS unit (high-pressure / final stage of the injection train)
P-0901_HP_Booster.summit_assembly: HPS H2K25MOD 1250HP 017STG SN35000CCW (top part 103036058), pump P/N 103034969

motor_current_limits_A.note: TMEIC trips at 154 A with short time delay

P-0901_HP_Booster.amps_per_bhp_note: amps ~= 0.1487 * water-BHP, calibrated to the live point below; PF/eff drift away from operating region

P-1021_LP_Booster.description: 26-stage SN35000CCW HPS unit, TANDEM 17-stage + 9-stage sections on one shaft (low-pressure / first stage of the injection train)
P-1021_LP_Booster.summit_assembly: Horizontal Pump System SN35000CCW 26 STAGE 1500HP (GA D01968990 A, order H3777), pump P/N 103048789
P-1021_LP_Booster.seal: Flowserve UHTW 2250 / DHTW 2250 double cartridge, 1.5 shaft, CW

motor_current_limits_A.note: VFD limits current to 192 A; TMEIC trips at 209 A; motor FLA / iFix temp limit 216 A

P-1021_LP_Booster.amps_per_bhp_note: amps ~= 0.1435 * water-BHP, calibrated to the live point below

live_operating_point_2026-06-16.constraint: AMP-LIMITED: 190.9 A is at the 192 A VFD drive limit. At 60 Hz this point would need ~219 A, so the drive holds it near 57.3 Hz. Cannot make more flow/head without exceeding the limit.

compute.bhp_total_water: n_stages * bhp_per_stage(Q_60hz)   (multiply by SG ~1.04 for actual shaft power)
compute.affinity_to_other_speed: Q = Q60*(Hz/60); head = head60*(Hz/60)^2; BHP and amps ~ (Hz/60)^3

validated: Matches live SCADA 6/16/2026 within ~1 percent at SG 1.04: LP dP model 1874 vs 1887 psid live; HP dP model 1336 vs 1326 psid live. Series train confirmed by SCADA (LP discharge 2104 ~ HP intake 2082 psig). Shut-off head/stage 234.5 ft matches 2021 factory section tests (242 & 228 ft, avg 235). Reproduces Summit's own HPS selection sheet (57 Hz / 34,000 BPD).
